name: Delhi Fast Ghazi into Castle
author: Valdemar1902
reasoning: Valdemar's Ghazi raid build — the top-scored Delhi guide by a wide margin. Ghazi raiders harass while Delhi's free techs research in the background, converting into a strong Castle timing.

notes: Mill : wheelbarrow professional scouts survival techniques horticulture mosque : efficient production piety (cancel piety for instant research of sanctity on feudal age up) sanctity all seeing eye lumber camp : forestry double broadaxe
5 starting villager delhi to trees to chop 50 wood then build mill on berries 1 villager delhi builds mosque
New villager delhi builds house then berries
1 new villager delhi to food (8 total)
3 new villager delhi to mining camp gold
2 new villager delhi to chopped trees , then 1 new villager delhi to build lumber camp at woodline (pull the 2 villager delhi from straggler when 50 wood ) Keep rallying to wood until 5
Dome of the faith on berries with 4 berries villager delhi
When 5 on wood you rally point back to sheep until 12. Then wood again until 12
Queue all feudal upgrades 2 villager delhi from wood build stable ( put scholar inside stable and pump ghazi raider 2 nonstop )
Blacksmith archery range barracks in whatever order makes sense (usually go production buildings first and add 2x blacksmiths later around 8-10 mins)
Only go age 3 when you have secured 2 deer packs with professional scouts
In age 3 immediately queue war elephant and add 2 more archery range for archer 2 + crossbowman 3 Also Start stone for keep & village fortresses
